title: Top K Frequent Elements
description: Return the `k` most frequent values in `nums`. The exact order of the result does not matter as long as the right set of elements is returned.

parameters.name: nums
parameters.description: Array of integers that may contain duplicates and negative values.

parameters.name: k
parameters.description: Number of most frequent elements to return.

returns.description: The `k` most frequent elements, in any order.

constraints: 1 <= k <= number of distinct values in nums
The order of the returned elements does not matter
